abilities.name: The Wind's Path
abilities.description: Immune to disengaging strikes. When pushed, may increase/decrease distance by Speed Aspect (min 1).

abilities.name: Smoke Screen
abilities.description: Enemy attacks from 6+ yards suffer - to attack flip.

abilities.name: Lone Assassin
abilities.description: Gains Focused +1 when attacking character 6+ yards from allies.

actions: (1) Double-Edged Sword (Melee) | AV: 5R (13R) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram.
(1) Shuriken (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 5M (13M) | Rg: z8 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage. Rapid Fire +2. Mask Leaf Steps: After, move 3 yards.
(2) Rapid Fire | Discard Twist Card for three 1 AP attacks vs single target.
system.notes: Ancient Katanaka Clan assassins. Now secretly Ten Thunders. Masters of stealth and precision. Scalpel against syndicate targets.
